Off Calendar Feb-21-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT RECOLOGY, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Counsel for Recology is to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
